checks.name: freemember_movie_only_free
checks.description: FreeMember may watch a Movie only when isFree

checks.name: freemember_show_only_free
checks.description: FreeMember may watch a Show only when isFree

checks.name: subscriber_movie_no_rent_buy
checks.description: Subscriber may watch a Movie only when !needsRentOrBuy

checks.name: subscriber_show_release_or_premium_early
checks.description: Subscriber may watch a Show only when (!isEarlyAccess) OR (now >= releaseDate) OR (premium AND now >= releaseDate-24h)

checks.name: freemember_must_watch_free_movie
checks.description: FreeMember MUST be permitted to watch any free Movie

checks.name: freemember_must_watch_free_show
checks.description: FreeMember MUST be permitted to watch any free Show

checks.name: subscriber_must_watch_movie_no_rent
checks.description: Subscriber MUST be permitted to watch any !needsRentOrBuy Movie

checks.name: subscriber_must_watch_show_not_early
checks.description: Subscriber MUST be permitted to watch any !isEarlyAccess Show

checks.name: subscriber_must_watch_show_post_release
checks.description: Subscriber MUST be permitted to watch a Show that is past its releaseDate (early-access lifts after release)

checks.name: premium_must_watch_show_early_in_window
checks.description: Premium Subscriber MUST be permitted to watch a Show in early access if now is within 24h before releaseDate

checks.name: freemember_no_rent
checks.description: FreeMember can NEVER rent a Movie (empty ceiling)

checks.name: subscriber_rent_oscar_in_window_safety
checks.description: Subscriber may rent a Movie only when isOscarNominated AND now in [2025-02-01,2025-03-31]

checks.name: subscriber_must_rent_oscar_in_window
checks.description: Subscriber MUST be permitted to rent any Oscar-nominated Movie in window

checks.name: freemember_no_buy
checks.description: FreeMember can NEVER buy a Movie (empty ceiling)

checks.name: subscriber_buy_oscar_in_window_safety
checks.description: Subscriber may buy a Movie only when isOscarNominated AND now in window

checks.name: subscriber_must_buy_oscar_in_window
checks.description: Subscriber MUST be permitted to buy any Oscar-nominated Movie in window

checks.name: liveness_freemember_watch_movie
checks.description: FreeMember+watch+Movie has at least one permitted request

checks.name: liveness_freemember_watch_show
checks.description: FreeMember+watch+Show has at least one permitted request

checks.name: liveness_subscriber_watch_movie
checks.description: Subscriber+watch+Movie has at least one permitted request

checks.name: liveness_subscriber_watch_show
checks.description: Subscriber+watch+Show has at least one permitted request

checks.name: liveness_subscriber_rent_movie
checks.description: Subscriber+rent+Movie has at least one permitted request

checks.name: liveness_subscriber_buy_movie
checks.description: Subscriber+buy+Movie has at least one permitted request

results.description: FreeMember may watch a Movie only when isFree
FreeMember may watch a Show only when isFree
Subscriber may watch a Movie only when !needsRentOrBuy
Subscriber may watch a Show only when (!isEarlyAccess) OR (now >= releaseDate) OR (premium AND now >= releaseDate-24h)
FreeMember MUST be permitted to watch any free Movie
FreeMember MUST be permitted to watch any free Show
Subscriber MUST be permitted to watch any !needsRentOrBuy Movie
Subscriber MUST be permitted to watch any !isEarlyAccess Show
Subscriber MUST be permitted to watch a Show that is past its releaseDate (early-access lifts after release)
Premium Subscriber MUST be permitted to watch a Show in early access if now is within 24h before releaseDate
FreeMember can NEVER rent a Movie (empty ceiling)
Subscriber may rent a Movie only when isOscarNominated AND now in [2025-02-01,2025-03-31]
Subscriber MUST be permitted to rent any Oscar-nominated Movie in window
FreeMember can NEVER buy a Movie (empty ceiling)
Subscriber may buy a Movie only when isOscarNominated AND now in window
Subscriber MUST be permitted to buy any Oscar-nominated Movie in window
FreeMember+watch+Movie has at least one permitted request
FreeMember+watch+Show has at least one permitted request
Subscriber+watch+Movie has at least one permitted request
Subscriber+watch+Show has at least one permitted request
Subscriber+rent+Movie has at least one permitted request
Subscriber+buy+Movie has at least one permitted request

stages.name: semantic
stages.message: One or more semantic checks failed.
